content: The game's monthly pass is missing from the shop, has it been discontinued?
Please add the montly pass back!! <:cry2:1356068126894194758>
Bring monthly pass back, please. I was just about to buy it.

守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于7月21日21:40进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年8月4日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 修复了「商店-月相观测」丢失的问题。 
● 修复了「繁衍狂热」中杜勒赛因剧情错误显示为熔毁·朵尔的问题。
● 修复了调查行动「餍飨」中部分敌人攻击时，受击特效不显示或显示有误的问题。
● 修复了意识潜游「加冕之日」中部分对话的守密人头像性别显示错误的问题。
● 修复了活动「噬灵之飨」的关卡选择界面，背景图左上方有细线和文字重叠的问题。  
● 修复了头像「永不褪色的昨天：熔毁·朵尔」和「永不褪色的昨天：朵尔」描述错误的问题。
● 修复了「社区-特别鸣谢」中界面标题在不同分辨率下位置错误的问题。
● 修复了活动关卡点击挑战按钮弹出灵啡肽补给框后点确定无响应的问题。
● 修复了探索结算界面萨尔瓦多幻衣显示异常的问题。
● 修复了敌人「夏盖投影」缺乏「虫族」标签的问题。
● 修复了调查行动「餍飨」中性别代词显示错误的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」中，V2.3PV未显示的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒详情-历史记录」中唤醒类型显示错误的问题。
● 修复了「多维连接-逆转回合」进入剧情界面可能导致卡死的问题。
● 修复了部分语言设置下，「卡牌」描述文字边缘不清晰的问题。 
● 修复了「死灵的美学」活动介绍弹窗中存在错别字的问题。
● 优化了「调查-星级评价」的规则描述。
● 优化了「颅庭挽歌·限时纪行」的结束时间文本描述。
● 修复了重玩序章后，幻梦深潜造物数值显示异常的问题。
● 修复了活动弹窗中唤醒体活动倒计时显示错误的问题。

V2.3.0.1 Online Maintenance Announcement
Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on July 21 at 21:40. You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on August 4, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailbox in time to claim the supply materials.

[Update Content]
● Fixed the issue where "Shop - Moonphase Vigil" was missing. 
● Fixed the issue where Doresain's story in "Reproduction Frenzy" incorrectly displayed as Doll: Inferno. 
● Fixed the issue where hit effects were not showing or displayed incorrectly when certain enemies attacked in Investigation "Ossuary Gala". 
● Fixed the issue where the Keeper's portrait gender was incorrectly displayed in some dialogues of Psyche Deepdive "Day of Coronation". 
● Fixed the issue where fine lines overlapped with text in the upper-left corner of the background image on the stage selection screen for the "Soulfeast" event. 
● Fixed the issue where the descriptions for avatars "Unfading Yesterday: Doll: Inferno" and "Unfading Yesterday: Doll" were incorrect. 
● Fixed the issue where the title position in "Community - Special Thanks" was misaligned under different screen resolutions. 
● Fixed the issue where tapping Confirm after the Menophin Supply popup appeared when challenging a stage in an event resulted in no response. 
● Fixed the issue where Salvador's Illusion Outfit displayed abnormally on the Exploration Result screen. 
● Fixed the issue where enemy "Shaggai Projection" was missing the "Insectoid" tag. 
● Fixed the issue where gender pronouns were incorrectly displayed in Investigation "Ossuary Gala". 
● Fixed the issue where the V2.3 PV was not displayed in the "Archive". 
● Fixed the issue where the awakening type was incorrectly displayed in "Awakener Details - History". 
● Fixed the issue where entering the story screen from "Multidimensional Link - My Turn" could cause the game to freeze. 
● Fixed the issue where card description text appeared blurry at the edges in certain language settings. 
● Fixed the issue of typos in the popup description for the "Necrotic Aesthetics" event. 
● Optimized the rule description for "Investigation - Star Rating". 
● Optimized the end-time text description for "Ossuary Antiphon: Limited Journey".

● Fixed the issue where Relic values in "Phantasmal Dive" showed incorrectly after replaying the prologue. 
● Fixed the issue where the countdown timer for Awakener events was incorrectly displayed in event popups.

Fixed the following issues under the English language setting:

-Optimized some phrasing & grammar issues in “When the Stars Are Right” Chapter 3 Ossuary Gala & in “Ere Oblivion’s Dawn” Prologue through Chapter 3. 
-Improved the translations for Tutorials & the Terminologies page.
-Fixed some issues where the human translation failed to display in Sephirot Capture item names & Awakener Doresain’s Story Titles.
-Updated Awakener Tulu & Awakener Castor’s voice lines translations. Fixed the issue where Tulu’s special archaic self-address was wrongly translated.

在英文语言设置下修复了以下问题：

- 优化了《星辰正位之时》第三章及《忘却前夜》序章至第三章部分措辞与语法问题。
- 改进了教程模块与术语页面的翻译质量。
- 修复了部分情况下人类翻译未能显示的异常问题（涉及「源质捕获」道具名称与唤醒体杜勒赛因的故事标题）。
- 更新了唤醒体图鲁与卡斯托尔的台词翻译，修正了图鲁特殊古语自称被错误翻译的问题。
